name: Asgard Fiberglass Handle
description_full:
## Elevate Your Drywall Finishing Precision

Achieve professional-grade results with the Asgard Fiberglass Support Handle, a cornerstone component for high-efficiency drywall finishing. Engineered for contractors who demand reliability and ergonomic comfort, this handle provides the structural integrity required for intensive daily use while maintaining a lightweight profile that reduces operator fatigue.

## Seamless Integration and Control

This versatile handle is precision-engineered to interface flawlessly with a wide array of finishing tools, including angle heads, corner rollers, angle boxes, and nail spotters. The specialized D-shaped connection point provides a rigid, non-slip interface that eliminates unwanted rotation, ensuring your tools remain perfectly aligned during critical finishing passes. With a 1.25-inch diameter, the handle offers a natural, secure grip that enhances control and maneuverability in tight corners and high-reach areas.

## Key Features

- **Universal Compatibility:** Designed to work effortlessly with Asgard angle boxes, corner rollers, angle heads, and nail spotters.
- **Anti-Rotation Design:** The integrated D-shaped fitting locks securely into place, providing superior stability and preventing tool slippage.
- **Ergonomic Construction:** Features a 1.25-inch diameter shaft optimized for comfort during extended periods of operation.
- **Durable Build:** Constructed from high-strength fiberglass to withstand the rigors of demanding job sites while remaining lightweight.
- **Professional Efficiency:** Streamlines your workflow by providing a consistent, reliable connection across multiple finishing attachments.

name: Asgard “Hammer” Automatic Taper
description_full:
## Elevate Your Drywall Workflow with the Asgard Hammer

Experience a new benchmark in professional drywall finishing with the Asgard Hammer Automatic Taper. Engineered for contractors who demand reliability without the premium price tag, this tool streamlines the taping process by simultaneously applying joint tape and dispensing the precise amount of compound required. By integrating high-grade materials and ergonomic design, the Hammer minimizes physical strain while maximizing output on every job site.

## Built for the Demanding Professional

The Asgard Hammer is constructed to withstand the rigors of daily use. Featuring robust stainless steel side plates and a hard-anodized push rod, this tool is built to resist corrosion and mechanical wear. The inclusion of a durable cable drum ensures consistent performance, while the tool-free maintenance design allows you to spend more time working and less time servicing your equipment.

## Key Features

- **Precision Application:** Seamlessly applies tape and compound in a single, fluid motion to increase your daily square footage.
- **Ergonomic Control:** Features enclosed rollers on the control tube to provide a secure, comfortable grip while protecting your hands during repetitive use.
- **High-Reach Efficiency:** Equipped with a specialized control tube flange, allowing for effortless tape cutting even when working on high ceilings or difficult angles.
- **Rugged Construction:** Built with premium stainless steel and hard-anodized components for superior longevity and resistance to job-site elements.
- **Tool-Free Maintenance:** The streamlined tube protector design allows for quick adjustments and cleaning without the need for additional hand tools.

name: Asgard 2.5" Angle Head
description_full:
## Achieve Flawless Internal Corners with Precision

Elevate your drywall finishing standards with the Asgard 2.5" Angle Head. Engineered for professionals who demand speed without sacrificing quality, this tool is designed to feather joint compound across both sides of an internal corner simultaneously. Whether you are tackling wall-to-wall junctions or complex wall-to-ceiling transitions, this angle head delivers a consistent, professional-grade finish in one fluid motion.

## Streamline Your Taping Workflow

Integrating seamlessly into your existing taping setup, the Asgard Angle Head is the perfect follow-up to your corner roller. Once the tape is firmly embedded, this tool glides effortlessly to wipe down excess compound, leaving a smooth, feathered edge that requires minimal sanding. By reducing manual labor and rework, it significantly boosts your daily productivity on the job site.

## Key Features

- **Dual-Sided Efficiency:** Simultaneously feathers both sides of an internal corner for a perfectly symmetrical finish in a single pass.
- **Versatile Application:** Optimized for use in both vertical wall-to-wall corners and horizontal wall-to-ceiling joints.
- **Professional Consistency:** Ensures uniform compound distribution, eliminating the inconsistencies often found with manual hand-tooling.
- **Optimized Workflow:** Designed to work in tandem with standard corner rollers to complete the taping process with maximum speed.
- **Durable Construction:** Built to withstand the rigors of daily professional use, ensuring long-term reliability and performance.

name: Asgard 3" Angle Head
description_full:
## Achieve Flawless Internal Corners with Precision

Elevate your drywall finishing standards with the Asgard 3" Adjustable Angle Head. Engineered for professionals who demand efficiency and consistency, this tool streamlines the process of feathering joint compound on internal corners. Whether you are tackling wall-to-wall joints or ceiling-to-wall transitions, this finisher ensures a smooth, professional-grade result in a single pass, significantly reducing manual sanding and touch-up time.

## Advanced Control and Versatility

The standout feature of this Angle Head is its customizable spring tension system. By engaging or disengaging the rear tension springs, you gain precise control over the pressure applied to the wall, allowing for superior adaptability across various corner conditions. Designed to work seamlessly with the CA08-AD corner applicator, this tool features integrated wheels that glide effortlessly across surfaces, while the spring-loaded mechanism compensates for minor imperfections in framing or drywall installation, ensuring a clean, uniform finish every time.

## Key Features

- **Single-Pass Efficiency:** Simultaneously feathers both sides of an internal corner for maximum productivity.
- **Adjustable Spring Tension:** Tailor the tool's resistance to match specific project requirements and compound consistencies.
- **Smooth-Glide Wheels:** Engineered for fluid movement, minimizing drag and preventing surface marring.
- **Versatile Application:** Ideal for both vertical wall-to-wall corners and horizontal wall-to-ceiling joints.
- **Professional Compatibility:** Easily integrates with standard corner applicators and support handles (via CFA-AD adapter) for a complete taping and finishing system.
